caption: A split-screen layout features a website on the left and a video feed on the right. The website displays a product page for a "COLLECTION HALL OF FAME EDITION BASEBALL HOBBY CASE BREAK #1 *RANDOM HIT*" priced at "$40.99," with a red "SOLD OUT" button. Below this, text outlines break details, including "48 spots GUARANTEED 1 AH," a "1994 Donruss Baseball Superfraction Autograph #1 of 1," and a "1999 Topps Big Prime Autograph #1 of 1 NEW!" The right side shows a man with a beard, wearing a dark t-shirt, sitting in front of a microphone. He is positioned in a room with a dark background. A red banner at the bottom of his feed reads "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" next to a "Subscribe" button. Across the frames, the man remains in place, slightly shifting his posture and expression while speaking.
